ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the data collection */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude in degrees */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude in degrees */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude in kilometers */,
  "ne_iri16" TEXT /* Electron density in cm^-3 */,
  "te_iri16" TEXT /* Electron temperature in K */,
  "ti_iri16" TEXT /* Ion temperature in K */,
  "o_plus_iri16" TEXT /* O+ ion density in cm^-3 */,
  "o2_plus_iri16" TEXT /* O2+ ion density in cm^-3 */,
  "no_plus_iri16" TEXT /* NO+ ion density in cm^-3 */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spacecraft that collected the data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission associated with the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the mission */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission the spacecraft is part of */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the spacecraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the spacecraft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spacecraft the instrument is onboard */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., plasma sensor, composition analyzer) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the atmospheric data collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for collection */,
  "collection_time_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the data collection event */,
  "collection_status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection event */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, engineer, mission controller) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the atmospheric data accessed */,
  "access_time_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the atmospheric data processed */,
  "processing_time_utc" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the processing event */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing performed (e.g., calibration, analysis) */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the processing (e.g., report, dataset) */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user or system that processed the data */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing event */,
  "processing_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the processing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_processor_id FOREIGN KEY ("processor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data processing event that generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., scientific, technical) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_processing_id FOREIGN KEY ("processing_id") REFERENCES data_processing ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report involving the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user contributing to the report */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES data_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
